description: Audio scaled to 5% amplitude, nearly inaudible
expected_behavior: VAD may not detect speech, transcription likely empty or garbage

description: All samples zeroed out, complete silence
expected_behavior: VAD should detect no speech, transcription should be empty

description: Heavy distortion from 10x gain clipped at ±32767
expected_behavior: Transcription may be garbled or partially correct due to distortion

description: Constant +16000 DC offset added to all samples
expected_behavior: DC offset may cause asymmetric clipping and reduced dynamic range

description: Low-pass filtered audio (cutoff 600Hz) simulating slow playback
expected_behavior: Spectral centroid below 800Hz triggers wrong_sample_rate detection

description: High-pass filtered audio (cutoff 4500Hz) simulating fast playback
expected_behavior: Spectral centroid above 4000Hz triggers wrong_sample_rate detection

description: Only 50ms of audio (800 samples at 16kHz) instead of expected 100ms chunks
expected_behavior: Chunk may be rejected as too short, or buffering issues may occur

description: 200ms of audio (3200 samples at 16kHz) instead of expected 100ms chunks
expected_behavior: Chunk may cause latency issues or be split incorrectly

description: Raw PCM with swapped byte order for direct binary testing
expected_behavior: Raw PCM file for testing byte-order handling without codec interference

description: All speech replaced with random samples (white noise)
expected_behavior: VAD may trigger on noise, but transcription should be empty or hallucinated
